name: Recent Install - No Check Engine Light
description: Recent-install caller with a 'Check Hybrid System' message but no CEL.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: There's no check engine light, but my dash shows a 'Check Hybrid System' message since the install.
expectedOutcome: Agent explains DTCs may not be available without a CEL, that hybrid battery failures typically generate 'P' codes, that 'Check Hybrid System' covers 200+ components and doesn't automatically mean the battery, and that a licensed mechanic must diagnose it.
